'''pashozho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:khakanate|khakanate]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-sh-zh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:khakanate|khakanate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| pashozho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:pæshezheth|pæshezheth]] || [[word:pæshezhej|pæshezhej]] || [[word:pæshezhesh|pæshezhesh]] || [[word:pæshezhe|pæshezhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:pashoshozhoth|pashoshozhoth]] || [[word:pashoshozhoj|pashoshozhoj]] || [[word:pashoshozhosh|pashoshozhosh]] || [[word:pashoshozho|pashoshozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:pashozhoth|pashozhoth]] || [[word:pashozhoj|pashozhoj]] || [[word:pashozhosh|pashozhosh]] || [[word:pashozho|pashozho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:pashofzhoth|pashofzhoth]] || [[word:pashofzhoj|pashofzhoj]] || [[word:pashofzhosh|pashofzhosh]] || [[word:pashofzhof|pashofzhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:pashozhotho|pashozhotho]] || [[word:pashozhojo|pashozhojo]] || [[word:pashozhosho|pashozhosho]] || [[word:pashozhoko|pashozhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:pashozhoth|pashozhoth]] || [[word:pashozhoj|pashozhoj]] || [[word:pashozhosh|pashozhosh]] || [[word:pashozho|pashozho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:pashozhothol|pashozhothol]] || [[word:pashozhojol|pashozhojol]] || [[word:pashozhoshol|pashozhoshol]] || [[word:pashozhokol|pashozhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:pashozhothotho|pashozhothotho]] || [[word:pashozhojojo|pashozhojojo]] || [[word:pashozhoshosho|pashozhoshosho]] || [[word:pashozhoko|pashozhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:pashozhothon|pashozhothon]] || [[word:pashozhojon|pashozhojon]] || [[word:pashozhoshon|pashozhoshon]] || [[word:pashozhokon|pashozhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:pashozhothoro|pashozhothoro]] || [[word:pashozhojoro|pashozhojoro]] || [[word:pashozhoshoro|pashozhoshoro]] || [[word:pashozhokoro|pashozhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
